title: Symblon Agent Manifest
description: Manifest for a Symblon agent package (agent.yaml).

name.description: Human-readable display name shown in the marketplace.

handle.description: URL-safe slug. Becomes /<publisher>/<handle> in the registry.

description.description: Short description shown on the marketplace listing.

visibility.description: Controls who can discover and install this agent.

pricing.description: Pricing configuration. Omit or set model to free for free agents.

price_usd.description: Price in USD. Required when model is paid.

symbols.description: List of symbols this agent can issue. Each symbol must have a matching .sql in rules/ and .svg in themes/default/.

id.description: Stable identifier used as the filename key for rules and default theme assets.

name.description: Default display name. Overridden per theme in theme.yaml.

description.description: Shown on the symbol detail view.

window_hours.description: Time window in hours for temporal symbols. Required when type is temporal.
